arts.ttl: Champions League predictions: Tuesday's matchday 2 fixtures
arts.sum: Inter, who made a huge statement on matchday one by stifling Man City at the Etihad Stadium, will expect to kick on and consolidate with Red Star Belgrade at home. Looking to get off the mark for the season, Manchester City travel to Slovakia to face Slovan Bratislava, while another heavyweight in Barcelona are home to Young Boys of Bern.

arts.ttl: PSV vs Sporting CP: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: A pair of champions meet in Eindhoven on Tuesday night as PSV Eindhoven take on Sporting CP on Matchday 2 of the Champions League league phase. While Peter Bosz's PSV remain the class of the Eredivisie, Ruben Amorim's Sporting CP are aiming to hold off Lisbon rivals Benfica and a new-look Porto.

arts.ttl: Sergino Dest reveals how Xavi betrayed him at Barcelona
arts.sum: Dest had a promising start after joining the Catalan giants in 2020, learning from Messi and adapting to the style of the team. Sergino Dest broke new ground for American soccer when he signed with Barcelona, becoming one of the few U.S. Men's National Team (USMNT) players to join the Catalan giants.

arts.ttl: Eredivisie Podcast | When do Feyenoord sack Priske? Can Ajax challenge PSV for the title?
arts.sum: Football-Oranje’s Michael Statham and Mike Bell catch up on a new audio-only Eredivisie podcast. Thank you for watching, liking and commenting. Our show is available on SoundCloud, Apple Podcasts, or many other free podcast apps! arts.ttl: PSV Eindhoven vs Sporting Lisbon predictions: Expect entertainment in Eindhoven
arts.sum: PSV Eindhoven and Sporting Lisbon are dominant forces domestically and Enda McElhinney fancies them to produce plenty of goals in their Champions League showdown.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Arsenal handed boost in Joey Veerman race as 'growing feeling' revealed
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly eyeing up a move for PSV Eindhoven and Netherlands midfielder Joey Veerman, with Arsenal and Newcastle United also keen on the 25-year-old.

arts.ttl: PSV could be without key midfielder for Champions League clash with Sporting
arts.sum: VI are reporting that PSV could be set to be without Joey Veerman for a crucial Champions League match up with Sporting on Tuesday evening. The midfielder had to be…
Aidan Perkins runs through all 18 fixtures on Matchday Two in the new League phase of the Champions League with a score prediction for each game.
